variables.name: has_lantern
variables.description: The companys brass lantern, won at Harrowstone.

variables.name: marsh_guide
variables.description: Reed the fen guide taught the party the marsh calls.

variables.name: choir_key
variables.description: The pale singers coral key, key to the drowned choir.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=90 beats='Barrowmere three weeks after Harrowstone, the Brass Lantern sign newly hung, a marshals summons nailed beneath it naming the company, and town talk of pale strangers buying rope and salt on the south road'>>

choices.label: Read the summons under the sign.
See to supplies in the market first.
Go straight in to the taproom.
Cross the square toward the well talk.
Stop at the roadside shrine a moment.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the summons read twice, Heddas seal and one copied line from the wizards burnt notes, the second sleeps beneath the Greymarsh, and a boys chalk sketch of a coiled snake under it'>>

choices.label: Ask the gate watchman what he has seen.
Take the summons inside to the company table.
Decide the marsh is someone elses errand.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the gate watchman confirming it, pale robed buyers, wagons riding heavy toward the fords, and a marsh trader who never came back for his deposit'>>

choices.label: Head in to the taproom with the news.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the summons left nailed where it hangs, the road home taken before the story starts, and the fen left to keep its own secrets a while longer'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='market morning, the company famous enough now to be overcharged, and the south crossing needing oil, rope, and dry rations bought before noon'>>

choices.label: Buy lamp oil for the brass lantern.
Buy eel line and a grapple.
Walk the stalls and listen.
Poke through the oddments cart.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='a full jar of best lamp oil for the brass lantern, the oil seller refusing half the price for the heroes of Harrowstone and proud to lose the coin'>>

choices.label: Carry the oil jar to the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='forty feet of eel line and a grapple bought from the net makers widow, who says the marsh takes rope the way winter takes candles'>>

choices.label: Carry the coil to the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='a slow circuit of the stalls, listening more than buying, salt doubled in price this month and every buyer of it a stranger with soft shoes'>>

choices.label: Take what you heard to the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the Brass Lantern taproom before the crowd, Pell sweeping, the companys table by the fire kept empty for them like a small shrine'>>

choices.label: Size up the redcloak swords at the bar.
Go back to the company table.
Listen to the fiddlers new Harrowstone verse.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='two hired redcloak swords at the bar boasting they ride south tonight to beat the famous company to the marsh bounty, loud and half in their cups'>>

choices.label: Race the redcloaks south this same hour.
Let them ride and plan it right.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='riding south the same hour to beat two braggarts, half provisioned and unplanned, a lame horse by the fords and the commission returned unearned'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the taproom filling, Pell nodding toward the back where the company table waits, and the noise of a town that believes in you now'>>

choices.label: Join the table and spread the map.
Look in on the stable first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the company table with the summons flat on it, the crossing to plan, and the taproom full of people who each know one useful thing about the fen'>>

choices.label: Talk the plan through with Pell.
Order supper and eat while you plan.
Help Pell shift the flooded cellar kegs.
Check the watchroom ledger yourself.
Ask the drovers about the south fords.
Hear Pips riddle about the marsh.
Let old Maren read the lantern flame.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='mutton and barley over the map scrap, strength banked for the road, and a braggart at the next table telling Harrowstone wrong in your hearing'>>

choices.label: Bring Pell into the planning.
Correct the braggarts version loudly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Pells cellar flooded ankle deep from the spring rains, a favor asked, kegs to shift before they spoil, honest work with a bruise in it'>>

choices.label: Shift the kegs the careful way.
Rush the job and wrench your back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the watchroom ledger checked with the duty sergeant, three south road reports in a month, all of them mentioning bells heard over the mire'>>

choices.label: Take the reports back to Pell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='Pell leaning close over the bar, the crossing needs Bram and Sable and Elowen back under one roof, and two of the three have reasons to say no'>>

choices.label: Start with Bram at his forge wagon.
Admit your own doubts first.
Study Heddas map scrap over the bar.
Hear Pells warning about the fen.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the doubt spoken aloud at the bar, the marsh is not a keep, no walls to breach, only mud that keeps what it takes, and Pell waiting on your answer'>>

choices.label: Square your shoulders and go find Bram.
Let the company rest on its one victory.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the doubt winning the bar argument, the company standing down with its one victory kept safe, and the south road carrying other, lesser help'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Bram at his forge wagon settling debts like a dwarf leaving forever, shield new painted, saying the marsh drowned better dwarves than him'>>

choices.label: Offer a full share and gate money.
Give him the plain truth of the taken.
Pick up the spare hammer and help first.
Stand him an ale and talk shield work.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the offer of a full share and gate money up front, counted onto the anvil where he cannot pretend not to see it'>>

choices.label: Close the bargain on the anvil.
Push too hard when he hesitates.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the plain truth instead, the pale ones take fen folk the way the Redtooth took drovers, and the company is going with him or without'>>

choices.label: Wait out his long silence.
Push too hard when he hesitates.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='an hour swinging his spare hammer first, finishing the wain hitch beside him, asking nothing until the work is done'>>

choices.label: Ask him once, with the work done.
Push too hard when he hesitates.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the push too far, the dwarfs patience snapping shut like a tool chest, the forge wagon rolling out at dawn without a word left behind for you'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the shield shouldered, the forge banked, and Bram saying one condition, no boats he cannot stand up in, and meaning it'>>

choices.label: Go find Sable on the roof ridge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Sable on the inn roof ridge flipping a southern fences letter, an offer of city work, clean and dry and paid in advance'>>

choices.label: Dice for it, letter against commission.
Read the fences letter at her shoulder.
Counter the offer, first pick and first name.
Bet her she cannot walk the ridge blind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='dice for it on the ridge tiles, her letter against your commission, the whole street pretending not to watch'>>

choices.label: Let the dice settle it clean.
Snatch the letter mid throw.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the letter read closer at her shoulder, the fences seal pressed in gray wax, a coiled snake, and Sable going very still'>>

choices.label: Point at the snake seal and say nothing.
Read the seal aloud to the street.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the snake seal named aloud on a public roof, heads turning in the street below, and a watch sergeant starting toward the ladder'>>

choices.label: Talk fast and get off the roof.
Argue with the watch sergeant.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the roof argument ending in the lockup for disturbing the kings peace, one night on a plank bed while the tide and the timing drain away'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the counter offer, first pick of anything the temple holds and her name first on the company book, made once and left to sit'>>

choices.label: Leave the offer to sit and turn away.
Snatch the letter to force the choice.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the letter snatched and the trust snatched with it, Sable over the ridgeline with her offer and gone south alone by the smugglers roads'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the letter folded into her boot, the fence unanswered, and Sable saying the snake was hiring her away from the snake hunt, which decides it'>>

choices.label: Turn in for one real night of sleep.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='one full night in real beds at the Lantern, boots dry by the fire, the first whole sleep since Harrowstone, strength coming back'>>

choices.label: Go to Elowen at her aunts shop.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='Elowen at her aunts shop shelving simples, aunt Aldous between her and the door with folded arms and a list of reasons'>>

choices.label: Vouch for her to aunt Aldous yourself.
Accept the aunts gathering errand.
Answer her wizard question honestly.
Ask Elowen what she wants, plainly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='your word given to Aldous across the counter, the girl came home whole once and will again, signed in the shop ledger like a bond'>>

choices.label: Sign the shop ledger as her bond.
Bristle at the old womans terms.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the aunts terms bristled at once too hard, the shop door shut, and the company short its scholar with the fen bells still unanswered'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='Aldous naming her price, fen samphire and three marsh simples gathered fresh on the crossing, a shop errand wrapped around a blessing'>>

choices.label: Take the list with good grace.
Take the list and the lecture both.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='Elowen asking straight if there is a wizard in this one, and the honest answer, worse, a whole choir of them, and her aunt listening'>>

choices.label: Promise her the truth the whole way.
Soften it, and let her hear the lie.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the softened lie heard for what it is, Elowen staying home on principle, and three at the ford where four were needed'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the chalk case packed, two new sticks bought, and Elowen out the door with her aunts list nailed inside the lid like a charm'>>

choices.label: Go to Hedda for the commission.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=90 beats='Hedda at the marshals table with the burnt notes and fifty crowns of new commission, the Greymarsh circle inked on her map, and the brass lantern set between you like a flag'>>

choices.label: Set the brass lantern on the table and accept.
Accept the commission with a plain hand.
Ask for Tallows cart for the south leg.
Ask why the redcloaks were hired too.
Accept Heddas parting gift.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=60 beats='Tallows own freight cart lent for the south leg, greased and provisioned, the merchants debt paid in axle and harness'>>

choices.label: Roll south for the fords at first light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the South Fords where the road splits three ways to the fen edge, the downs path over shepherd country, the river landing with a barge bell ringing, and the drover droves through the carrlands'>>

choices.label: Take the downs path over shepherd country.
Take passage on Wecks river barge.
Walk the drover droves through the carrlands.
Chase the dust plume on the downs first.
Work the weir walk shortcut past the landing.
Follow the stray bell note over the carrlands.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the downs path climbing through sheep runs, a shepherds gate ahead, and two familiar redcloaks camped square across the stile demanding a toll of everyone bound for the fen'>>

choices.label: Go the long way around the toll camp.
Face the redcloaks down at the stile.
Run the fallows shortcut past them.
Talk to the shepherd watching it all.
Chance the boggy cut below the stile.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the long way around the toll camp by the gorse line, slow and legal, the redcloaks jeering at your backs'>>

choices.label: Crest the downs by the gorse line.
Cut back to the shepherds lane.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the toll argued down face to face, redcloak bluster against company reputation, and their captain deciding how far to push it'>>

choices.label: Hold your ground until they blink.
Let Bram step forward and settle it.
Push past the captains hand.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the redcloak captain deciding to push it all the way, a stile brawl the company cannot afford, and the watch escorting everyone back to the fords with the day and the tide lost'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='the fallows shortcut past the camp at a run, dogs loose behind, and a dry stone wall to clear before the bite arrives'>>

choices.label: Clear the wall and keep running.
Turn and face the dogs in the open.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the wall clipped at speed, dogs closing on the tumble, and the toll camp collecting four scraped travelers off the fallows, kit docked as damages, sent back down the road'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the downs crest at last, the Greymarsh spread below like a tarnished mirror to the horizon, and a chapel bell tower drowned to its shoulders marking where the land gives up'>>

choices.label: Take the shepherds lane down to the fen.
Study the drowned bell tower first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the shepherds lane down the far slope, sheep bells and honest mud, and the first breath of marsh air, salt and rot and patience'>>

choices.label: Follow the lane to the fen edge road.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the run walked off on the downhill mile, scratched and winded but ahead of the toll camp, the fen edge rising to meet the road'>>

choices.label: Walk it off down to the fen edge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the river landing and Wecks eel barge at the stage, the old man grinning at his famous passengers, and the current running south brown and fast with spring melt'>>

choices.label: Ride the barge and pump Weck for news.
Take poling lessons at the stern.
Help the eel boy with the pots.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the barge ride offered free for Harrowstone, eel pots to dodge, and Weck talking the whole watch about pale customers who paid in old coin and would not touch the water'>>

choices.label: Swing the kit ashore at Saltmire stage.
Ride to the last bend for the long view.
Doze off to Wecks talk mid river.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='poling lessons taken at the stern for the fen ahead, blisters bought and banked, Weck correcting your grip with the patience of a man who has taught forty nephews'>>

choices.label: Land at the stage, blisters and all.
Pole the last reach yourself.
Ask Weck about the old charm he hums.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the landing at Saltmire stage, kit swung ashore over open water, the gap between gunwale and dock wider than it looks'>>

choices.label: Jump the gap with the kit balanced.
Toss the kit across first, carelessly.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the careless toss short by a hand, kit and lantern oil into the brown current, and a soaked day spent grappling the bottom while the trail goes cold south'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the last bend taken slow, Weck pointing out the drowned chapel and the crow trees where the fen folk leave their dead season gifts'>>

choices.label: Put ashore at the crow trees.
Walk the bank while Weck ties up.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the drover droves, green lanes sunk between hedges running toward the carrlands, cattle long gone, the ruts holding yesterdays wheel marks heavy and southbound'>>

choices.label: Follow the heavy wheel marks.
Keep to the drove lane itself.
Cut across the open carrland sedge.
Count the wheel marks properly first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the wheel marks followed at a tracker walk, heavy wagons riding low, and a fork where the ruts leave the drove for a black pool crossing'>>

choices.label: Stay on the ruts to the ford.
Follow the ruts onto the black pool planks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the drove kept instead of the ruts, hedges closing overhead into a green tunnel, and something pacing the far side of the blackthorn'>>

choices.label: Push through to the old ford.
Slip through the hedge away from the pacing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='a carrland cut across open sedge to save the afternoon, ground going from firm to shivering underfoot a stride at a time'>>

choices.label: Crawl the shivering ground flat and slow.
Sprint the last stretch before it opens.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the old ford found where the drove meets the fen river, marker stone leaning but honest, water at the knee and no worse'>>

choices.label: Cross at the marker stone.
Check the stones old carvings first.
Cross fast without sounding the water.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=70 beats='the black pool crossing tried where the wagon ruts went, planks laid by someone who wanted followers, and the middle plank soft as bread'>>

choices.label: Leap back off the soft plank.
Trust the plank one more step.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the plank giving way mid stride, black water with no bottom made of yesterdays wagon bait, and the pool keeping what it was set to catch'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the sedge cut finished on hands and knees, soaked to the hips and cold, but the fen edge gained ahead of dark'>>

choices.label: Wring out and make the fen edge road.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='hoofbeats down the green tunnel behind, pale riders on marsh ponies sweeping the droves, and one hedge gap to vanish through'>>

choices.label: Vanish through the hedge gap and lie still.
Outrun the ponies on the straight.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the straight lost to marsh ponies bred for it, pale riders closing in a hedge lane with no gaps, and the droves delivering the company to the Coil bound and early'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='crows wheeling over the fen edge road, a fen familys eel barge dragged ashore and broken open, catch and kit strewn, no bodies, and pole tracks going south into the mire'>>

choices.label: Search the broken barge itself.
Watch what the crows avoid upstream.
Read the pole tracks at the mud line.
Circle the wreck wide and watch first.
Walk the perimeter for dropped things.
Say fen words over the spilled catch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the barge searched bow to stern, cargo slit open and left, which means the takers wanted the family and not the catch'>>

choices.label: Check the reed bank the crows shun.
Follow the pole tracks south now.
Search under the dragged hull.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the crows watched instead of the wreck, wheeling wide of one reed bank upstream, marking something alive they will not land near'>>

choices.label: Close on the reed bank quietly.
Throw a stone and see what rises.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the pole tracks read at the mud line, six polers pushing heavy, one set of small boot prints dragged between them'>>

choices.label: Check the reed bank before leaving.
Follow the tracks south at once.
Cast wider for the small boots.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the wreck circled wide first, watching the reeds for watchers, patience spent like coin before one step into the open'>>

choices.label: Move in on the reed bank.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the reed bank upstream closed on quiet feet, and a low whistle answered from inside it, two notes, a marsh call, weak but human'>>

choices.label: Answer the two note call and go in.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the road left to follow the pole tracks straight south, fast and loud, the mire swallowing sound and boot alike'>>

choices.label: Push south hard along the pole trail.
Push on through the flooded reach.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the tracks lost in a flooded reach and found again the hard way, waist deep and shivering, on the far bank'>>

choices.label: Come out on the far bank and cast about.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the pole trail followed loud and fast into a waiting picket, reeds full of gray hoods, and the company poled south exactly like the family it came to find'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='Reed the fen guide dragged out of the reeds, Wecks nephew, arrow creased and half drowned, the only one of the barge family who slipped the takers, and full of what he saw'>>

choices.label: Bind the wound and take his story.
Carry him until his legs come back.
Answer his challenge with the lantern.
Give him Elowens fen herbs first.
Send word back to Weck downriver.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Reeds wound bound and his story taken, pale ones in gray poled his kin south to the old temple grounds, and he teaches the marsh calls to the company that is going after them'>>

choices.label: Learn the marsh calls and move.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Reed carried the first mile on your own shoulders until his legs answer, and the calls taught breath by breath on the way, heron, plover, and the all clear'>>

choices.label: Set him down at the hamlet path.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Reed asking who you are to go where fen folk drown, and the brass lantern held up in answer, Harrowstone named once, quietly'>>

choices.label: Let him take the companys measure.
Tell the lantern story short and true.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the boys measure taken and given back, Reed swearing the company into fen kin with mud pressed in both palms, and the calls taught'>>

choices.label: Take the mud oath and the calls.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the lantern story told short and true, Reed nodding at the right parts, and the marsh calls traded for it like fair freight'>>

choices.label: Shoulder packs for Saltmire hamlet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the last dry ground at Saltmire hamlet, fen wives feeding the company while the crossing is argued, four ways into the deep mire and none of them kind'>>

choices.label: Take the headwomans floor for the night.
Go over every strap and buckle.
Argue for beating the storm south.
Gather the hamlets fen lore.
Climb the old burial mound for the view.
Trade news with the peat cutters.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='a nights rest taken at Saltmire on the headwomans floor, dry peat smoke and borrowed blankets, strength coming back'>>

choices.label: Start clean in the morning mist.
Oversleep and rush the start.
Hear the headwomans last counsel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the early start made clean, mist still on the meres, the hamlet waving the company off the dry ground'>>

choices.label: Take the marked pole trail south.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=65 beats='the late start rushed, kit half packed and one pot left behind, the sun already burning the mist off the open mire'>>

choices.label: Take the trail and make up time.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the gear gone over piece by piece on the hamlet common, straps waxed, the lantern trimmed, everything tied against the mud'>>

choices.label: Set out with the kit squared away.
Water the ponies at the old corral first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the storm argument, black weather stacking in the south and the headwoman advising one more night, against the tide table'>>

choices.label: Go now and race the black weather.
Push into the storm regardless.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the storm raced and the storm winning, a night pinned on a shrinking hummock with the kit soaking, and dawn spent limping back to Saltmire to start again poorer'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the hamlets fen lore gathered by the fire, which meres lie, which sing, and why nobody poles within earshot of the bells'>>

choices.label: Set out wiser in the morning.
Sit with the map over the fire first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the pole trail off the dry ground at last, marked with rag knots on bent alders, the mire opening flat and shining and wrong to the horizon'>>

choices.label: Follow the rag knots at a fen pace.
Let Reed sound the lane ahead.
Check the burned polers platform.
Send a decoy splash down a side channel.
Push on into the dark to gain a march.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the rag knot line followed fast, wet lane between meres, and one stretch where the lane dips under standing water'>>

choices.label: Wade the flooded dip on the line.
Guess a shortcut off the rag line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the shortcut off the rag line, moss that was never ground at all, and the lane drowning its guesser quietly while the marked trail looks on'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the lane taken slow behind Reeds pole, sounding every stride, the mire breathing under the moss like a sleeping herd'>>

choices.label: Keep the slow pace to the crannog.
Pause at the singing mere Reed names.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='a polers rest platform on stilts, half burned, Coil leavings scattered, and the first bell note heard far off, one low tone that does not end'>>

choices.label: Push on toward the crannog smoke.
Rest cold at the burned platform.
Search the Coil leavings for papers.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the platform passed the long way around its open water, cold wading, eyes on the reeds the whole time'>>

choices.label: Wade on to the crannog landing.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=climax words=90 beats='Col, a fen boy of ten, alone on a crannog with his familys dog, who saw the pale ones pole his mother and uncles toward the drowned temple, and who points the way with a steady hand because someone must'>>

choices.label: Follow where Col points, into the deep mire.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the deep mire at last, the temples bell tower breaking the horizon like a rotten tooth, and four ways in, the drowned causeway stones, the high esker road, the old grange sluice, and the peat cutters galleries under the moss'>>

choices.label: Take the drowned causeway stones.
Take the high esker road and bridges.
Light the lantern and take the grange sluice.
Go under the moss by the peat galleries.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the causeway running arrow straight through open water, stones awash at each dip, Coil poler patrols working its length in pairs, and cover only where the parapet still stands'>>

choices.label: Bluff the patrols in gray hoods.
Time the sweeps and wade the gaps.
Wade the flanking shallows instead.
Study the parapet line for cover first.
Check under the causeway arches.
Listen to the patrol horns pattern.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='a poler pair met head on at a narrow, no cover either way, and Sables gray hood trick ready, walk like you belong or fight like you do not'>>

choices.label: Walk the narrow like you belong.
Take the pair down quiet instead.
Overplay the bluff with a Coil sign.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the patrol timed from a parapet gap, twelve breaths between sweeps, and a flooded stretch to wade inside that window with a watch horn hanging over it all'>>

choices.label: Wade the stretch inside the window.
Borrow the supply skiff at its mooring.
Cut the horn down first, loudly wrong.
Check the chain locker under the stones.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the causeway left for the flanking shallows, wading the soft margin below the stones, slower, wetter, and out of the patrols easy eye line'>>

choices.label: Slog the margin the whole way.
Cut across the black lagoon.
Rest on the dry hummock first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the bluff holding all the way past the narrow, two gray nods traded, and the causeway spending its last dry mile toward the terrace ring wall'>>

choices.label: Walk the last mile to the ring wall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the fight taken instead, short and quiet behind the parapet, two polers folded into the reeds with their horn unspent, and the mile beyond walked in borrowed hoods'>>

choices.label: Take the mile in borrowed hoods.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the Coil sign given one flourish too many, a countersign you never learned, and the narrow filling from both ends with gray hoods while the bluff dies on your hands'>>

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the rush a drovers answer to sorcery, Bram taking the light on his shield boss with a grunt like a struck bell, the master borne down under honest weight and eel line, trussed with his own chained folio for a pillow'>>

choices.label: Haul him up and signal the way out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the scramble lost by a fingertip, the master winning his own weight in vanity back, stone and folio both, gray light herding the party up the dead stair while he laughs like a ledger closing, the raising only postponed'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='one step too near the patient gap, the gray grip finding your shoulder instead of his, cold beyond argument, and the last thing over the threshold of hearing the seal starting its lullaby again, for you'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the dive taking the seal stone on bleeding knuckles, no strength left for masters, only for running, Bram scattering a brazier, Sable calling the turns, Elowen throwing her last chalk to flare blinding white, and the temple above waking like a kicked hive'>>

choices.label: Run for the sluice line and the drain.
Run for the choir ways and out the long dark.
Turn at bay in the antechamber arch.
Cut past the half open door itself, the shortest line.
Climb against the rout and take the bell tower out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the sluice line run on fumes, the long heron call sent ahead down the drain, iron grates and cold water, hands hauling hands, and the ditch taking everyone in a tangle under the last of the moon'>>

choices.label: Count heads in the ditch and move.
Stop to wrap the humming stone mid run.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the choir ways swallowing the party one by one, the coral slot sighing shut on the masters curses, stone passages older than the Coil running dark and patient under the mire, and Elowens last candle stub lighting the way'>>

choices.label: Walk the long dark out.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the antechamber arch a fine place for a last stand and a poor one for living, poles filling it end to end while gray light seals the far arch, the seal stone prised from your arms almost gently, and the pens after all'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the shortcut past the half open door a memory before it finishes, the gray reach faster than tired legs, cold taking the sound out of the world, and the seal singing you down into the dark it guards'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='the way out with the stone singing low and the master finished, the temple emptying as Reedcloaks stream for dry land, the pens giving up their people, Marta counting fen folk aloud like her own heartbeats, the child asleep on Brams shoulder, and the east showing gray through the broken ring wall'>>

choices.label: Take the road home to Barrowmere.
Parade the bound master once around the terrace first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='the quiet after the door, retreat bells far above, and Gorse himself at the antechamber arch with his honor guard, looking long at the shut door and the stone in your arms, saying the bargain is done, the Reedcloaks pole at dawn and the prisoners walk free on his word'>>

choices.label: March everyone home under a hired captains strange safe conduct.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the ditch and the open mire beyond, eleven freed souls and four spent ones moving hummock to hummock while the temple burns torchlight at its own shadows, Marta leading by ways only peat folk know, the stone wrapped and humming against your back'>>

choices.label: Walk the last miles into dawn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the choir ways giving out through a fox thicket door on a dry esker two miles south, stars overhead like spilled salt, the long way home begun on aching legs with the stone quiet at last, as if it knows it is leaving'>>

choices.label: Take the long way home.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=completion words=90 beats='Barrowmere at midmorning, the company up the Kings Road with eleven souls behind them and the second seal in an iron banded box beside the first, Hedda at the gate with the town at her back, Reed grinning from Wecks cart, fifty crowns counted, and in the quiet after, one line of Korvanes folio legible where the water failed, the third sleeps under the mountains'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='the strangest homecoming yet, a Reedcloak honor guard halting at the third milestone to watch the freed walk the last stretch alone, Gorses parting gift a reed tied in a sailors knot over the mountain passes on your map, the pale ones buy ponies there too, and Hedda paying fifty crowns to a company that made a hired captain keep his word'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='dawn over the open mire and Barrowmere bells at the sight of the column, eleven souls delivered footsore and laughing at nothing, the second seal set beside the first on Heddas table, both faintly singing to each other until the boxes are parted, and the marshal reading the one legible folio line twice, the third sleeps under the mountains'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=85 beats='the long way round ending four days late through the south fords, the town half into mourning bands when the company walks in whole, the second seal delivered with esker burrs in everyones hair, and Hedda adding a map besides, because the Coils ledger ran north into the mountains and someone with a brass lantern will have to follow it'>>

Get pulled into mending the trough wall.

Wave the company forward in the open.

Hurry the loose slates at a trot.

choices.label: Come home the long way.

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='silt dust and one held sneeze that wins its argument on the ninth landing, echoing down the colonnade like a war horn of the nose, and the pillar shadows emptying of everything but the Coil'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the honor guard captain weighing your silver with genuine sorrow, then taking it and you both, a bribe is property and property goes to the captain, and the queue for Gorses justice has a fine view of the rite'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the relief line stepping on the offbeat you supplied, the stumble running up the whole file bell by bell, and the ring master wheeling with his cord already singing'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the third call one call too many, panic curdling into pattern, captains triangulating the vaults with torch lines, and the call answering its own echo in a room already full of listeners'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the second lashing parting with a groan the bells cannot cover, the scaffold sagging like a tired horse, and the ring master following the sound to its source, unhurried'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the postern crack widened one finger for a better view, the view improving in both directions, the Whispers eye meeting yours down the gap for a heartbeat that lasts a season, and the blind side blind no more'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the statues front taken in the open to save a scramble, silhouette printed on lamp glow for the whole floor to read, and the descent finishing in a forest of raised poles grown up around the chin'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='a pause to wrap the humming stone mid run, the hum swelling under cloth like a hive disturbed, its one note calling down the corridors to everything that hunts by ear, run down within sight of the drain'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the bound master paraded once around the terrace for the freed to see, his lips moving inside the gag on the second lap, the coral sigil flaring white, and the eel line holding nothing but warm air and a smell of brine, the night still won but the ledger left open'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the wardens wayside shrine at the town edge, freshly swept by an unknown hand, a stone basin, a carved lantern niche, and old strokes worn almost smooth around the rim'>>

choices.label: Read the worn strokes with a wet thumb.
Leave a coin and go to the taproom.
Keep the shrine watch past curfew.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the strokes read with a wetted thumb, twelve names and a thirteenth space left uncut, and the sweepers besom still leaning on the basin, bristles wet'>>

choices.label: Carry the thirteenth space to the inn.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the shrine kept past the curfew bell, the town gate barred on schedule by a watch that admires but does not bend, and a night spent on the shrine step that the road south collects with interest'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Pip the pot boy with a fen riddle traded for a copper, what has a bed and never sleeps, a mouth and never eats, and his own answer whispered like contraband, the marsh, the marsh'>>

choices.label: Pay the copper and find Pell.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Heddas map scrap studied flat on the bar, the Greymarsh circle inked over older ink, causeway lines faint beneath, and one word in the old strokes under the circle, choir'>>

choices.label: Take the word choir to Bram.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Heddas parting gift at the gate, a tide table copied in her own hand from the fords ledger, floodtide marked in red for the next seven nights, and her flat advice, be done before the seventh'>>

choices.label: Roll south with the tide table.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='a dust plume chased along the downs, wagons maybe, riders maybe, and the choice of running it down or letting the road tell its own story in time'>>

choices.label: Run the plume down.
Let the road tell it and push on.
Chase it past the second valley.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the plume run down to a sheep drift and a laughing shepherd, nothing, but the shepherds news solid, gray wagons ran the fen edge road three nights straight'>>

choices.label: Bank the news and make the fen edge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the fen edge road gained with the shepherds news banked, the crossing planned one fact richer'>>

choices.label: Join the fen edge road at the wreck.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the plume chased across two valleys and run down to dust and deer, the afternoon spent like a bad coin, and the fen edge reached too late to cross before dark'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the weir walk below Wecks landing, hurdles and plank ways over sliding water, and Wecks toll for the shortcut, one hours honest work lifting eel traps heavy as sin'>>

choices.label: Pay the hour and lift traps.
Walk the plank line fast through the fog.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the plank line rushed in the rising fog, one slick board turning underfoot, and the weir pool taking you cold as charity, wrung out on the bank while the day drains west'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='traps lifted and Wecks tongue loosened, a Coil tithe barge poled upriver three nights back riding heavy with sealed jars, and the one that followed it never came back down'>>

choices.label: Ask what the Coil fears about water.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Wecks shrug worth a chapter, the Coil hates open water but pays for it, so whatever rides those jars matters more than the hate, and the crows go west, follow the crows'>>

choices.label: File it away and follow the crows west.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='a bell note drifting over the carrlands where no church stands, thin and wrong and patient, and the droves bending away from it like grass from a fire'>>

choices.label: Follow the bell note to the rise.
Bend away from it like the droves do.
Send one scout toward it, no more.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the note followed to a rise, and below it a fen funeral poled in silence, mourners in undyed wool, a coffin boat, and outriders in gray watching the watchers'>>

choices.label: Withdraw the long quiet way.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the rise left quietly the long way, the funeral unbothered, and the fen edge road gained knowing the Coil watches even grief'>>

choices.label: Make the fen edge road by dusk.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the funeral watched one rise too near, the gray outriders folding around the watchers with the peculiar gentleness kept for witnesses, and the droves ending at a picket post'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the fen mothers sewing kit spilled at the wreck, and among the pins a lodestone needle on a thread, a poor womans compass, still pointing true when everything else here points wrong'>>

choices.label: Pocket the lodestone needle.
Linger sorting the whole kit.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the sewing kit lingered over as the reeds move, a search party of gray hoods beating back along the bank, and the wreck holding its visitors for them, needle and all'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the needle wrapped and pocketed for the marsh, where sky and water trade places, and the reed bank checked one more time on the way out'>>

choices.label: Check the reed bank and move on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='your own ration shared out with Reed while his color comes back, fen manners answered in kind, and the marsh calls taught over the shared bread, heron, plover, all clear'>>

choices.label: Walk Reed to Saltmire hamlet.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the headwomans story by the peat fire, her grandmother diving the temple as a girl on a dare, and the door under the water that hummed against her palm like a hive'>>

choices.label: Hear the story to its end.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the story ended with the grandmothers rule, three words, never at floodtide, and the fire spitting while everyone pretends not to count the nights'>>

choices.label: Count the nights and pack.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the tide table checked against the headwomans rule, five nights left before the big flood, arithmetic that packs the kit by itself'>>

choices.label: Take the trail with the arithmetic done.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='the crannog dog swimming out to meet the party a mile early, half wild with waiting, leading the last stretch by the dry line only a dog could know'>>

choices.label: Follow the dog to the crannog.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='pale lights off the causeway south side, lantern soft, swaying like carried lamps going somewhere reasonable, and Reeds hand closing on your sleeve, those are not lamps'>>

choices.label: Wait the lights out in the parapet shadow.
Follow the lights for a closer look.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the pale lights followed three stones too far, the causeway edge arriving mid stride where no edge showed, and the black water closing over the lights last joke'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the lights watched from the parapet shadow until they tire, drifting apart and guttering, and the causeway ahead empty again and honest'>>

choices.label: Take the empty causeway on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the last dry mile taken with eyes front, the lights returning behind you to dance where you would have drowned, and the ring wall rising ahead'>>

choices.label: Come up on the ring wall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='a sea eagles eyrie on the highest esker crown, the great bird riding its updraft, and the crest path passing directly beneath a nest the size of a cart bed'>>

choices.label: Pass beneath in the hunting hour.
Pass at midday under the birds eye.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the eyrie passed at the wrong hour, the great bird stooping once in warning and once in earnest, and the crest path surrendered at a run with the rations bag paid as toll'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the eyrie passed at a crouch in the birds hunting hour, the nest looted of nothing, dignity intact, and the watch platform in sight below'>>

choices.label: Drop toward the watch platform.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the sluice junction where four mouths meet, an echo chamber built by accident, every word returned fourfold, and a game the drain plays with counting'>>

choices.label: Map the echoes with finger snaps.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the echoes mapped with finger snaps, each mouth answering at its own delay, and the true way sorted from the liars by ear alone'>>

choices.label: Trust the snapped map and go.
Play one more round to be sure.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the echo game played one round too clever, four mouths singing your position in chorus to ears that know the chamber better, and lanterns arriving on the true way first'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the snapped map holding true, the cistern ladder found on the second mouth, and the drain left talking to itself behind you'>>

choices.label: Climb out at the cistern ladder.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='old Mag the kiln tender at her banked fire, blind these ten years and missing nothing, who names each of you by boot sound and offers tea and terms'>>

choices.label: Take Mags tea and terms.
Haggle the blind woman down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='Mags patience tested with a haggle too many, the blind eyes closing like a ledger, and her char season carried by someone else while the company backtracks unguided'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Mags terms honest, carry her season of char to the head of the straight run, and her directions in trade, exact to the prop and true as a plumb line'>>

choices.label: Carry the char and take her directions.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=85 beats='the pen grate reached along the wall shadow, Cols mother gripping the bars, names and numbers whispered fast, and the guard fires wandering closer with every traded breath'>>

choices.label: Break off and slip the midden door.
Trade one more breath of names.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='one traded breath too many at the grating, a guard fire wandering close enough to light both faces, and the grate watch collecting the visitor its prisoners tried to wave away'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the pens whisper relay, word passed cell to cell in the quiet game rhythm, tap and pause and tap, an inventory of the living taken through stone'>>

choices.label: Pass the word down the relay.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the relay finished at the last cell, eleven alive counted twice over, and the warder stirring in his chair as the last tap settles'>>

choices.label: Start the freeing at the key board.
Tap one more question down the line.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the whisper relay played too loud at the last cell, the quiet game lost by a syllable, and the warder rising from his chair with the key board already swinging'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the temples own history stacked in the vault as loot, carved panels pried from the choir, saints with their faces tallied for sale, and the lots marked for a buyer in the mountains'>>

choices.label: Copy the buyers mark and move.
Read the lots into the shift hours.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the history lots read lot by lot into the small hours of the shift, the vault door closing on schedule, and the reader inventoried at dawn along with the rest of the stolen past'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the buyers mark copied from three lots, a peak over a coil, and the panels left as found, history too heavy to rescue tonight'>>

choices.label: Take the service stair with the mark.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='a dead ward shell on the grotto floor, cracked and silent, safe to handle, and the live ones on the lines above chattering softly at their fallen sister'>>

choices.label: Pocket the dead shell for Elowen.
Flip it once in triumph first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the dead shell juggled once in triumph and clicked against a live line, the chatter spreading ward to ward like gossip, and the grotto closing around its visitors while the song never breaks'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the dead shell pocketed for Elowen, a wards anatomy in one cracked spiral, and the den glow ahead through the incense'>>

choices.label: Slip on toward the den glow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Marta raising her right hand in the lamp dark and deputizing the whole pen under peat law, drovers of one consignment, namely each other, and eleven backs straightening under the oath like masts taking sail'>>

choices.label: Set the signal and go to the gallery.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='Korvanes camp desk in the lattice gaps narrow slice, an open ledger in a fine hand, sums owed to the mountain seat, and one line underlined in fresher ink, the seat expects the second door open by winter'>>

choices.label: Carry the ledger line down the stairs.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='murals down the choir way where the sound slots pause, the twelve wardens painted at this same door in older robes, the door shown shut, and behind it the crowned sleeper dreaming a flood that fills the next three panels'>>

choices.label: Take the lesson to the doors blind side.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the pillar forest floor itself, bench stones and offering troughs giving belly cover between bell beats, a slow crawl through the rotundas own furniture with rank boots an arms length away'>>

choices.label: Crawl the last trough line to the lamp ring.
Crawl through the bell pause to save time.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the trough line ending in the cradles own shadow, silt in your teeth, bells overhead like weather, and the waking words beginning close enough to feel on your neck'>>

choices.label: Rise on the blind side and move on the rite.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='one trough short of the shadow when the bells pause between verses, the crawl loud as a landslide in the sudden hush, and small hard hands finding your ankles before the next peal'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the inn stable and Tallows cart ponies, a borrowed mare offered by a drover for the south leg, sound of wind but shy of water, and the stable boys honest doubt about her fen manners'>>

choices.label: Decline the mare and keep the cart.
Take the borrowed mare south.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Pells last warning over the bar rag, the fen took his brother whole cart and team in his fathers day, and the one rule the family kept after, never argue with ground that moves'>>

choices.label: Carry the rule to Bram at his wagon.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the borrowed mare bolting at the first shivering ground, kit scattered down a wet mile, and the day spent catching her and apologizing to the drover instead of making the fen edge'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the braggarts version corrected loudly with names and particulars, half the taproom taking notes, and word of the companys route running south ahead of it to ears that pay for such things'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the drowned chapel bell tower studied from the crest, and once, clear across the whole mire, its bell swinging with no hand on the rope, one note, then still'>>

choices.label: Go down to the fen edge with the bells note.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the bank walked while Weck ties up, and a tithe jar shard in the mud, gray sealed, snake stamped, sniffed once and thrown hard away, brine and something under the brine'>>

choices.label: Rejoin Weck at the stage.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the ford marker stone read close, older than the droves, a warden mark under the moss with an arrow pointing south and two words, choir sleeps'>>

choices.label: Cross at the marker and push on.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the ford crossed fast without sounding, the drowned second step deeper than any yesterday, and a kit soaking swim that ends the days progress at a fire trying to dry fifty crowns of gear'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a childs slate found in the wreck straw, letters practiced in a careful hand, mama, boat, home, and the reed bank suddenly the only thing in the world worth checking'>>

choices.label: Check the reed bank now.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the council hour flat on the crannog boards over the map, Sable arguing sluice, Bram arguing causeway like an honest soldier, and Elowen asking what the wardens would have used until everyone looks at the drains again'>>

choices.label: Sleep on it and let the tide choose.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the trail pushed at moonrise against every counsel, night sign misread within the mile, and the picket that watches the drag trail by dark folding around the party like a purse string'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='a patrol horn dropped on the causeway stones, dice cup and all, the pair gaming instead of walking their beat, and their backs to the narrows for one more throw'>>

choices.label: Walk the narrows behind their backs.
Watch one more throw from cover.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the narrows walked behind the gamers backs, the dice clicking cover better than any smoke, and the ring wall gained while someone loses a weeks pay'>>

choices.label: Push on to the ring wall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='one throw watched too long from too near, a gamers eye catching the extra shadow, and the pair proving they can do their job after all, loudly, with the horn'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a pilgrims cache stone on the crest, lid ajar, oilcloth and hard bread still good, and an old climbing rope coiled on top, gray with years'>>

choices.label: Take the oilcloth and bread, leave the rope.
Coil the old rope onto your pack.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=50 beats='the old cache rope trusted on the next scarp, gray strands parting at the first honest load, and the scarp foot collecting what the years already paid for'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='an otter run worn smooth beside the dam, a body wide slide under the works, and the otters own door into the lower drain for anyone willing to go like an otter'>>

choices.label: Go like an otter, kit dragged behind.
Send the kit through and follow blind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the otter run tried with a wardens shoulders, stuck fast at the turn with water rising to argue about it, and an hour of backward inches that spends the nights margin whole'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the diggers work song learned through a props width of peat, call and answer, and the answer line hummed along until it sits in the mouth ready to be sung'>>

choices.label: Hum the answer line and pass as crew.
Sing out on the next call to be sure.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the answer line sung one call early, the work song stopping dead, and tallow lights converging on the singer who knew the words but not the timing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the warders water round due by the tide clock, a jug filled at the brine vats and carried to his chair on schedule by someone in a borrowed gray hood'>>

choices.label: Deliver the round on the clocks minute.
Deliver it early and be done.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the water round delivered a half turn early, the warder waking to a stranger in gray pouring his jug, and the chair reflexes proving faster than the hood was convincing'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the hall hound circling the gallery screen, old and honest and doing its work, one strip of dried eel offered flat palmed through the carving'>>

choices.label: Feed it flat palmed and pass on.
Pull back the strip when it snuffles.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the hound taking the eel strip and the wrist behind it, gentle as a vice, an honest sentry doing honest work, and its baying bringing the benches before the grip can be argued with'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='a novice awake in the last cell, young and scared and watching you cross her doorway, a long breath where either of you could end the other night'>>

choices.label: Hold her eyes and back away slow.
Lunge to hush her first.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='the novices nerve breaking toward the bell rope, her scream and the peal arriving together, and the dormitory wing rising around its youngest and proudest in the same breath'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a train of plunder porters crossing the emptying court, a crate shouldered for a pass and a chin tucked for a face, Korvanes own baggage carrying you toward the deep stair in plain sight'>>

choices.label: Set the crate down at the stair head.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='a wardens sound slot at the posterns own hinge, the font framed close enough to count the seal stones rivets, the Whispers song learned breath by breath, and the exact half beat where the singer must inhale'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite at the half beat.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the lamp ring counted from the last pillar, eleven lamps, two guttering, the gap between them the width of a coffin boat, and the routes rehearsed twice behind closed eyes before one boot moves'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite through the guttering gap.
Cross while the near lamp gutters lowest.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=60 beats='one guttering lamp choosing that heartbeat to flare, the gap becoming a stage and the crawl a performance, reviewed by the nearest rank at pole point'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='Gorses patience misjudged by one demand too many, the captain grown tired of humans who bargain like victors, and the honor guard closing with the gentleness kept for valuable hostages'>>
<<FILL role=failure words=55 beats='the bell skin split by a misjudged elbow, one flat note in a wall of right ones, and the ring masters cord finding the flaw faster than thought'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='old Maren at her corner table asking for the brass lantern itself, lit and set between you, her milky eyes reading its flame the way younger eyes read print'>>

choices.label: Set the lit lantern between you.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=85 beats='the flame reading given flat and slow, the lantern remembers a door, it will remember another, and when the flame leans with no draft, follow the lean, then Maren done with you entirely'>>

choices.label: Take the reading to Bram at his wagon.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the wrecked barges false bottom found by knuckle tap, a smugglers board lifted, and beneath it the familys real cargo, dry books, a parish register, the fen villages memory sent away for safety'>>

choices.label: Hide the register better and note the place.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the register wrapped back watertight and hidden better, a note of its place taken for whoever lives to tell the family, and the reed bank calling'>>

choices.label: Go to the reed bank the crows shun.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='Wecks hummed charm asked after plainly, and given plainly, his grandmothers weir song for keeping fingers when the eels run, and one verse nobody in the family ever understood, about a door that hums back'>>

choices.label: Carry the weir song to the fen edge.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the hedge bones by the trail read by lantern shade, not hedge but the posts of an old droving corral, and where drovers penned cattle there is water, a sweet well under its lid ten paces on'>>

choices.label: Rise watered and rested for the trail.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='a Coil polers satchel left hanging at the burned platform, fish hooks and loaded dice, and a folded tide table scratched on soft leather, floodtides marked in red to a seventh night circled twice'>>

choices.label: Pocket the tide table and see to Col.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='a chain locker in the ring wall footing, portcullis gear a century seized, and through the rusted grating a crawl space running clean under the water gate, floored with dropped coins nobody could ever reach'>>

choices.label: Crawl the coin floor under the gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the crawl space giving onto the winch room stair inside the wall, pockets heavier by a fistful of strangers coins, and boots quiet on steps built for chains'>>

choices.label: Take the winch stair down into the terrace.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='an old beacon basket on the esker crown, iron rusted to lace but the bracket bolts true, and a wardens sight line straight down the mire, every approach to the temple laid out like a supper table'>>

choices.label: Fix the watch fires positions from up here.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the watch fires committed to memory with their blind lanes between, a map made of dark stripes, and the descent begun knowing exactly where not to be seen'>>

choices.label: Slip down on the counted blind lanes.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='a tally board at the sluice junction, grange marks a century old and Coil chalk over them, jars in, jars out, and the jars out column stopping dead three tides ago'>>

choices.label: Carry the tally to the cistern ladder.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the tally carried like a lamp, whatever the jars fed is no longer being fed, which is either mercy or appetite, and the cistern ladder ahead'>>

choices.label: Climb to the terrace grating.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='the great mother kiln at the gallery head, cold a generation, big enough to walk through, and its flue running clean up through the moss into open air behind the ring wall'>>

choices.label: Climb the mother kilns flue.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the flue climbed knees and back, soot to the eyebrows, and the grate at the top lifting onto terrace shadow, strength traded fair for surprise'>>

choices.label: Lift the grate onto terrace shadow.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the dig crews manifest under a stone on the tally shack step, wages owed against names, half the names struck through with one word after each, diver'>>

choices.label: Pocket the manifest and make the wall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the stair walls scratched with a garrisons worth of boredom, tallies and initials and one rude drawing of a ring master, and among them, deeper and older, a warden mark with an arrow down and two words, choir stair'>>

choices.label: Follow the wardens arrow down.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=75 beats='Martas whispered muster through the grate, eleven names in order of age, Whin the youngest at nine and fierce, two fevered but walking, and Cols mother alive with her arm splinted in reed and profanity'>>

choices.label: Tell Marta her freight is about to move.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the word passed cell to cell in the quiet game rhythm, eleven people packing nothing at all with tremendous care, ready, and having been ready since the first night'>>

choices.label: Set the plan with the pen ready.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='the lead tablets Coil chalk read against the old script, Elowens quick key finding the cheat, the Coil is not translating the liturgy, it is inverting it, every hush made a waking, every stay made a rise'>>

choices.label: Copy the inversion key small.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the inversion copied small into Elowens chalk case, the counter now a matter of reading the old lines as written, and the court gallery stairs ahead'>>

choices.label: Climb to the choir loft lattice.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=80 beats='two novices gossiping past the alcove, the Whisper quarreled with the master over wages of all things, she sings for the Coil but she is owed, and owed singers, says the older one, sing flat when it matters'>>

choices.label: Bank the quarrel and keep moving.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=70 beats='the gossip banked like coin, a singer who feels cheated standing between Korvane and his door, and the court gallery stairs ahead with one more lever in the bag'>>

choices.label: Climb to the loft with the lever.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='Korvanes pacing counted from the loft like a jailers rounds, eleven strides, turn, eleven strides, and every eleventh his eyes flicking to the deep stair as if something might come up it early, asking after schedules'>>

choices.label: Slip down to the deep approaches.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=80 beats='the last mural panel studied one breath longer, twelve wardens at the door but one painted turned away, hand over mouth, and under the flaking wash a scribed correction, eleven sang, one listened, the listener keeps the count'>>

choices.label: Go to the blind side and keep the count yourself.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the panic shopped like a market, a dropped torch collected, a watchword learned from a shouting captain, and one gray robe lifted off a hook in passing, the confusion paying wages to anyone calm enough to collect'>>

choices.label: Move on the rite dressed in borrowed chaos.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=75 beats='the rite time counted from inside the bell line, nine peals and a rest, nine and a rest, and in every rest the Whispers song alone and naked for half a breath, the exact seam where a wrong note would tear'>>

choices.label: Carry the count down to the rite.
